goal: Fix homepage/profile lock mismatch (#3), log readings after login (#5), locked-deck unlock-conditions popup (#6)
done: #3: home deck strip now re-renders on auth-state change (subscribeAuthState) — it painted once before auth resolved, showing decks LOCKED while /profile (which re-renders on auth) showed UNLOCKED; row.replaceChildren makes re-render safe. #5: readings drawn while logged out are queued (queuePendingReading → localStorage meowtarot_pending_readings, deduped) and flushed to Supabase on SIGNED_IN (auth.js dynamic-imports flushPendingReadings to avoid the reading-history↔auth cycle). #6: tapping a locked deck (logged-in) now shows an unlock-conditions popup (deck art + 'Draw on N days to unlock · M to go') stated in accumulated days, replacing the toast; logged-out still → sign-in gate.
verified: harness: queue dedupes (2 pushes→1, flush exported); home strip uses replaceChildren (no dup on re-render); logged-out locked tap → sign-in gate (correct). node --check passes all 5. md5 parity canonical=www=ios. Unlock popup logged-in path code-verified (needs a session for final visual).
